DRV8825-based stepper motor driver with microstepping to 1/32 step. Adjustable current limiting and thermal shutdown. Drives NEMA 17 bipolar steppers from baseboard GPIO.

## Hardware Specifications

  - **Chip**: DRV8825
  - **Voltage**: 8.2V-45V motor supply
  - **Channels**: 1 stepper (2-phase, 4-wire)
  - **Pins**: STEP, DIR, ENABLE, MS1-MS3
  - **Dimensions**: 42 x 32 x 14 mm
  - **Weight**: 16 g
